name: AMZ - The Grand-ish Tour (2026) (GB)
plot: Gathering in the care home where they now live, Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May host three special shows looking back at their favourite Grand Tour moments. Or at least the ones they can remember. Their fading memories stretch from California to Mongolia to Italy and everywhere in between, and include classic moments of misery featuring mud, water, and at least two actual injuries.
cast: Jeremy Clarkson, James May, Richard Hammond

name: AMZ - American Gladiators (2026) (US)
plot: A cast of amateur athletes are pitted against each other as well as the shows’ own gladiators across a range of challenges including a tough obstacle course.
cast: Mike Mizanin, Eric Bugenhagen, Jessie Godderz, Michael Wardlow

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing - Denmark - Halloween Special (2025) (DK)
plot: In this Halloween special of LOL – Last One Laughing, four fearlessly funny duos battle through a haunted edition of the ultimate no-laugh game. Dressed to scare and amuse, they must keep a straight face – but with Anders Breinholt as host, it's only a matter of time before heads roll.
cast: Anders Breinholt

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Denmark (2023) (DK)
plot: 100.000 DKK for a charitable purpose is at stake, when ten of Denmark's funniest comedians compete to be the last one laughing in a competition where you’re not allowed to laugh.
cast: Sofie Linde

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Colombia (2023) (CO)
plot: For the first time in Colombia, LOL opens its doors to 10 of the best comedians to compete against each other to win the LOL trophy while they dare to make comedy free of censorship and limits. In this crazy extreme experiment, comedians will reveal much more than their repertoire of jokes. What will be their challenge? Make each of their opponents laugh while keeping a straight face.

name: AMZ - MrBeast: Extreme Survival! (2026) (US)
plot: In this season, MrBeast pushes contestants and himself into the toughest survival experiments imaginable, from one hundred days in bunkers and circles to freezing expeditions and isolation tests. Every scenario is designed to strip life to its basics and reveal who has the strength, patience, and ingenuity to endure.
cast: Jimmy Donaldson

name: AMZ - MrBeast: Epic Adventures! (2026) (US)
plot: In this season, MrBeast takes friends and contestants on journeys into crazy environments.
cast: Jimmy Donaldson

name: AMZ - LOL Talent Show: Mexico (2026) (MX)
plot: Eugenio Derbez, Michelle Rodríguez, Capi Pérez, and Adal Ramones travel across Mexico in search of comedians with the "LOL gene." From Monterrey to Mérida, the hopeful face unexpected challenges and extreme tests. Only the best will win a spot inside the LOL house, in a stiff competition of who can get the most laughs.
cast: Eugenio Derbez, Adal Ramones, Carlos 'Capi' Pérez, Michelle Rodríguez

name: AMZ - JUST MAKEUP (2025) (KR)
plot: Korea's first-ever makeup survival show highlights all things K-beauty. Top makeup artists and creators compete, showcasing their skills. Expect stunning visuals and techniques as they unveil new looks with each mission. The tension is high as they vie for the title of No. 1 makeup artist. Get ready for a survival show filled with dazzling beauty.
cast: Lee Hyo-ri, 정샘물, Risabae

name: AMZ - Dating Unlocked (2022) (CA)
plot: Daters compete in an elimination-style competition of relationship games, to unlock the chance of winning a second date with a desirable mate.
cast: Yaz Harris

name: AMZ - Roast on the Coast (NO) (2025) (NO)
plot: Six Norwegian comedians have packed their bags and traveled to Cyprus for a week of sun, swimming – and roasting! Each night, a new comedian will take the hot seat to have their life torn apart by the other comedians, before the best roaster of the night is crowned. On the final day of the stay, the week's best roaster and the winner of Roast on The Coast Norway will be announced.
cast: Otto Jespersen, Steinar Sagen, Lisa Tønne, Magnus Devold, Martin Lepperød, Nora Svenningsen

name: AMZ - Heels in the Hay (2025) (NL)
plot: Twelve city influencers trade their luxurious urban lives for the harsh reality of the Dutch countryside. No filters and no oat milk cappuccinos - just early mornings, dirty hands, and fierce competition. They discover that farm life holds more hidden challenges than they ever imagined. Which city dweller will hold their ground? One thing is certain: it won’t be a picture-perfect scene...
cast: Robbert Rodenburg, Lena Semenova, Tom 'The Countess' Haegens, Faisel Abdoelhak, Iris De Waard, Yordi Nogmaals, Jasey Harders, Marc-Junior Dufour

name: AMZ - Know Where to Hide - Wie niet weg is… (2025) (NL)
plot: Led by presenter Stefan Jurriens, participants are challenged to find the ultimate hiding spot and hide for 90 minutes in some of the most iconic and striking locations in the Netherlands, such as Soestdijk Palace, Euroborg Groningen, Walibi Holland, Hof van Saksen, Archeon and Twenthe Airport.
cast: Stefan Jurriens, Wiwa, Britt Scholte, Selma Omari

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing UK (2025) (GB)
plot: Famous for his dark humour, one liners and THAT laugh, Jimmy Carr challenges 10 of Britain’s funniest comics to spend the day together without so much as cracking a smile. The 10 comics use every ounce of their comedic talents to try and break their opponents without cracking up themselves.
cast: Jimmy Carr, Roisin Conaty, Richard Ayoade, Rob Beckett, Harriet Kemsley, Judi Love, Joe Lycett, Daisy May Cooper

name: AMZ - Ziddi Girls (2025) (IN)
plot: The lives of 5 self-absorbed Gen Z freshers is about to change as they enter the corridors of Matilda House college. Deep friendships form over a year of mistakes, heartbreaks and self-discovery as they put themselves between their college & the forces that threaten it.
cast: Nandita Das, Revathi, Simran, Nandish Singh, Anupriya Caroli, Atiya Tara Nayak, Ayushi Rawat, Zaina Ali
director: Rangita Pritish Nandy, Ishita Pritish Nandy

name: AMZ - Are You Smarter Than a Celebrity (2024) (US)
plot: Contestants play for the chance to win up to $100,000 by answering questions about things they learned in grade school. There's a classroom full of celebrities they can get help from – including Nikki Glaser, Nicole Byer, Lala Kent, Ryan Fitzpatrick and more! Can they ace grades 1 through 5 for a chance to play for the big money? Or will they flunk out along the way? It's time to find out!
cast: Travis Kelce, Queen Noveen

name: AMZ - Beast Games (2024) (US)
plot: I gathered 1,000 people to fight for $5,000,000, the LARGEST cash prize in TV history! We're also giving away a private island, Lamborghinis, and millions more in cash throughout the competition! Go watch to see the greatest show ever made!
cast: Jimmy Donaldson
director: Jimmy Donaldson, Tyler Conklin, Sean Klitzner

name: AMZ - Dames in de Dop (2024) (NL)
plot: The long-awaited reality series 'Ladies in the Cap', in which nine women embark on the adventure to discover their true potential, returns to Prime Video in a renewed version. Presenter Robbert Rodenburg receives Anna, Cassidy, Emmely, Fabienne, Jennifer, Michelle, Rachel, Ramona and Shani for an intense elimination race in a Social Academy.
cast: Robbert Rodenburg, Vincent Vermeulen, Anne-Marie van Leggelo, Anna Tschur, Cassidy Vermeulen, Emmely Hartjesveld, Fabienne van den Bogaart, Jennifer Casongo

name: AMZ - Killer Cakes (2024) (US)
plot: Host Matthew Lillard welcomes four teams of killer cake artists to an abandoned warehouse, where they will compete for $20,000 and the Golden Knife trophy. They will work with some of the best horror special effects artists in Hollywood to bring their cakes to life and scare the hell out of the show’s expert judges—Scream Queen Danielle Harris and food artist and Halloween aficionado Nikk Alcaraz.
cast: Matthew Lillard, Danielle Harris, Nikk Alcaraz

name: AMZ - Love Island: All Stars (2024) (GB)
plot: Some of your favourite Islanders from across the years heading back to the stunning South African villa to once again 'graft' as their search for love continues.
cast: Iain Stirling, Maya Jama

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Indonesia (2024) (ID)
plot: The hosts will lead top comedians in a chaotic battle of wits and endurance. A room devoid of laughter, where comedians armed with jokes and timing engage in a high-stakes battle to survive longer.
cast: Pandji Pragiwaksono, Indra Jegel, Dicky Difie, Asri Welas, Rina Nose, Andre Taulany, Marshel Widianto, Ivan Gunawan

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Philippines (2024) (US)
plot: “LOL” or “Last One Laughing” is a reality show where ten comedians battle it out to make each other laugh. With no smiles allowed, they unleash their best jokes and antics, aiming to make each other crack up for six hours. It’s a hilarious battle of wit and self-control, where the last one laughing wins ONE MILLION PESOS!
cast: Vice Ganda, Pepe Herrera, Kim Molina, Rufa Mae Quinto, Empoy Marquez, Jerald Napoles, Victor Anastacio, Chad Kinis

name: AMZ - Ebuka Turns Up Africa (2024) (NG)
plot: Six celebrities embark on an African adventure. Clashing personalities, tested friendships as they face challenges journeying across Africa's landscapes.
cast: Ebuka Obi-Uchendu, Timini Egbuson, Zubby Michael, Jimmie Akinsola, Alistair Englebert Preston, Onaja Adole

name: AMZ - Camping de Wildernis
plot: Vier families die hun vakantie normaal gesproken op een Nederlandse camping vieren, gaan kamperen in Afrika, zonder verdere informatie vooraf. Als ze bij hun gastheer Johnny de Mol met al hun koffers aankomen in Botswana is het enige dat ze kunnen uitbrengen: "We hadden alles verwacht, behalve dit!". En dan moet het spel nog beginnen, want behalve buren, zijn ze ook elkaars concurrenten.
cast: Johnny de Mol

name: AMZ - The GOAT (2024)
plot: 14 reality superstars—from Bachelorettes to Housewives to Survivors to Drag Racers and everyone in between—move into GOAT Manor under the watchful eye of host Daniel Tosh to compete in over 20 challenges, earning and breaking one another's trust along the way. New sides of longtime favorites will be on display as they battle it out for $200k…and the title of Greatest of All Time.
cast: Daniel Tosh

name: AMZ - Wild and Free: Cabo (2024)
plot: Eight hot, young singles arrive to an amazing villa in Los Cabos, San Lucas for the vacation of a lifetime.
cast: Fernando Lozada, Niurka Marcos, Carlos 'Capi' Pérez, Kristal Silva, Victoria Volkova, Celeste Cheles, Fede Del Real, Yámir Gonzalez

name: AMZ - LOL Talent Show: Be Funny and You're in! (Italy) (2024)
plot: Straight from the world of LOL comes LOL Talent Show: Be Funny and You're in! Get ready for a barrage of aspiring comedians and an exciting contest hosted by Forest, the magician! Three judges: Elio, Katia Follesa, and Angelo Pintus. Their mission? To find the tenth contestant for LOL 4! They'll travel through Italy and be assisted by a different guest judge on every episode.
cast: Michele Foresta, Fabio Balsamo, Maria Di Biase, Elio, Katia Follesa, Michela Giraud, Lillo Petrolo, Angelo Pintus

name: AMZ - Wild and Free
plot: A group of young and charming individuals forms relationships, parties, fights, laughs, and cries during their eventful stay at a luxurious beach house in Florianópolis (Floripa).
cast: Felipe Titto, John Drops, Thaís Pereira, Alef Cardoso, Aila Vitória, Gabriel Lopes, Eduardo De Carli, Marcela Carvalho

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Norway
plot: Sigrid Bonde Tusvik gathers ten of Norway's funniest people in the same room, with the following challenge: Don't laugh for six hours, while you do whatever it takes to make the others laugh. The winner of LOL: Den som ler sist leaves the house with NOK 100,000 for their chosen charity.
cast: Sigrid Bonde Tusvik, Herman Flesvig, Hege Schøyen, Maria Stavang, Mikkel Niva, Jon Øigarden, Janne Formoe, Amir Asgharnejad

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing South Africa
plot: Ten well-known South African comedians and performers compete to discover who can maintain composure while simultaneously trying to make their opponents laugh and lose.
cast: Trevor Noah, Glen Biderman-Pam, Robby Collins, Lasizwe Dambuza, Jason Goliath, Mojak Lehoko, Celeste Ntuli, Nomzamo Mbatha

name: AMZ - The Teddy Teclebrhan Show
plot:
In his new variety show, Teddy presents us with the very best of his world. The six new episodes include love, music, comedy, celebrity guests, and creative chaos, which together create a brilliant show performed in front of a live audience with a live band! Antoine, Ernst Riedler, and Percy all have their own particular ideas about how the show works best, even if they are all played by Teddy.
في برنامجه المتنوع الجديد، يقدم لنا تيدي أفضل ما في عالمه. تتضمن الحلقات الست الجديدة الحب والموسيقى والكوميديا وضيوف المشاهير والفوضى الإبداعية، والتي تخلق معًا عرضًا رائعًا يتم تقديمه أمام جمهور حي مع فرقة موسيقية حية!
cast: Tedros Teclebrhan

name: AMZ - Twin Love
plot:
Ten sets of twins will be divided into two houses with identical casts, where they will start an intriguing and gripping search for love. The series will discover if their inherent similarities extend to their romantic desires.
سيتم تقسيم عشر مجموعات من التوائم إلى منزلين بقوالب متطابقة، حيث سيبدأون بحثًا مثيرًا للاهتمام عن الحب. سيكتشف المسلسل ما إذا كانت أوجه التشابه المتأصلة بينهما تمتد إلى رغباتهم الرومانسية
cast: Brie Garcia, Nikki Garcia

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Sweden
plot: Ten of Sweden's best comedians compete to make each other laugh, without bursting into laughter themselves. Anyone who can't keep up goes out of the competition where 500,000 SEK for charity is at stake. All under the direction of Eva Röse.
cast: Eva Röse, Robert Gustafsson, Per Andersson, Sussie Eriksson, Anders Jansson, Anders Johansson, Clara Henry, Vanna Rosenberg

name: AMZ - LOL: Enga Siri Paappom (India)
plot: 6 hours, 10 diverse comedians, 2 hilarious hosts, Dare you to laugh. We have a bag of all-star comedians including Rowsu-baby Maya, Mr. Over-the-top Pugazh, Peter Party Baggy, Kalaai King Vigneshkanth, Single Payyan Premgi, Chellakutty Harathi, Rascal-Boy Abhishek Kumar, self-proclaimed king of comedy Powerstar Srinivasan, Ragala Rani Syama and Jagajaala Killadi Sathish.

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Argentina
plot: The social experiment, hosted by Susana Giménez, seeks to find the next "10" of comedy and crown the first winner of LOL ARGENTINA. The one who laughs loses, and the one who provokes more laughs from his rivals will be the winner.
cast: Susana Giménez, Grego Rossello, Lucas Spadafora, Miguel Granados, Dan Breitman, Micaela Lapegüe, Julián Lucero, Martín Rechimuzzi

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Quebec (Canada)
plot: Patrick Huard invites 10 comedians to this unique experience that borders on torture. They will spend six hours together in an enclosed space where it is forbidden to laugh. The last one to laugh will win the contest, as well as $100,000 for the foundation of their choice.
cast: Patrick Huard, Roxane Bruneau, Fabien Cloutier, Pier-Luc Funk, Philippe Laprise, Katherine Levac, Mariana Mazza, Neev

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Germany
plot: Ten top stars of German comedy join in the ultimate battle to find out who laughs last! Who will be able to stay serious? Which performance won't leave a dry eye in the house? And who will be the last one standing?
cast: Michael Herbig, Elton, Martina Hill, Michael Mittermeier, Jan van Weyde, Max Giermann, Cordula Stratmann, Kurt Krömer

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Brazil (2021) (BR)
plot: A comedy show where ten professional comedians face off for six hours in a row to keep a straight face, while they try to make their opponents laugh.
cast: Fábio Porchat, Tom Cavalcante, Ed Gama, Estevam Nabote, Gregório Duvivier, Flávia Reis, Luciana Paes, Igor Guimarães

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Italy (LOL: Chi ride è fuori)
plot: Is a comedy show where ten professional comedians face off for six hours in a row to keep a straight face, while they try to make their opponents laugh. The first time someone laughs the contestant gets warned, the second time, they get eliminated from the game. Whoever manages to resist without laughing all the way through the six hours wins EUR100,000 to turn over to the charity of their choice.
cast: Fedez, Herbert Ballerina, Fabio Balsamo, Luca Bizzarri, Cristiano Caccamo, Paolo Cevoli, Marta Filippi, Nino Frassica

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Australia
plot: Hosted by Rebel Wilson, 10 of Australia’s finest comedians battle it out to see who can keep a straight face while simultaneously trying to make their opponents laugh. Comedians who laugh will be eliminated one-by-one, until a single comedian remains. With $100,000 on the line, who will Rebel crown the Last One Laughing?
cast: Rebel Wilson, Anne Edmonds, Becky Lucas, Dilruk Jayasinha, Ed Kavalee, Joel Creasey, Frank Woodley, Nazeem Hussain

name: AMZ - LOL - Hasse Toh Phasse
plot: In this 6-hour long comedy duel, the comedians who give in to the laughs get eliminated one by one, and the last one who manages to keep a straight face is crowned 'Last One Laughing'
cast: Aakash Gupta, Arshad Warsi, Boman Irani, Gaurav Gera, Sunil Grover, Cyrus Broacha, Mallika Dua, Kusha Kapila

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing (Mexico)
plot: An unscripted variety series from Mexico in which ten professional comedians compete for a cash prize by trying to make each other laugh. The one who refrains from laughing the longest, while forcing other contestants to laugh first, is the winner.
cast: Eugenio Derbez

name: AMZ - LOL - Last One Laughing Spain
cast: Yolanda Ramos, Silvia Abril, Carolina Iglesias, Patricia Conde, Anabel Alonso, Henar Álvarez, Juan Amodeo, Lorena Castell

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing... or Screaming France
plot: They're back! For Ahmed Sylla, Audrey Fleurot, Fadily Camara, Hakim Jemili, Kyan Khojandi, Camille Lellouche, Bérengère Krief & Gérard Darmon, the danger is everywhere: in this edition, screaming can sometimes be as fatal as laughing! The last person who holds out against their opponents' attacks and the scare-themed, booby-trapped arena will get 150,000 euros donated to a charity of their choice.
cast: Philippe Lacheau, Gérard Darmon, Kyan Khojandi, Audrey Fleurot, Ahmed Sylla, Bérengère Krief, Camille Lellouche, Fadily Camara

name: AMZ - LOL : Qui rit, sort ! (2021) (FR)
plot: Philippe Lacheau has invited 10 actors and comedians to live a unique experience in a grandiose setting. There is only one rule to follow for the next 6 hours: if you laugh, you are eliminated. The 10 comedians will have to keep cool despite having to try and make each other laugh. The winner will get 50 000 euros for the charity he/she represents. Nothing is off limits!
cast: Philippe Lacheau

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Naija
plot: A unique, unpredictable, no-holds-barred comedy reality show and follows the successful format of Japan Amazon Original series, Hitoshi Matsumoto Presents Documental with iterations in 20 countries including Canada, Australia, Mexico, Brazil, Argentina, Ireland, Spain and now Nigeria. This series will see Basketmouth pit ten of Nigeria’s top tier comedic talent against each other in a celebrity showdown to win the grand prize for a local charity of their choice.
cast: Basketmouth, Okey Bakassi, Acapella, KieKie, Mr. Funny, Buchi, Dat Warri Girl, Taaooma

name: AMZ - LOL: Last One Laughing Netherlands (2023) (NL)
plot: Amazing comedians and harder laughs! Ten talents have six hours to make the others laugh. Who will be the last one laughing?
cast: Philippe Geubels, Jeroom Snelders, Jennifer Hoffman, Leo Alkemade, Tina de Bruin, Koen van Heest, Georgina Verbaan, Leny Breederveld
